pred_reason: The SWC-101 label is appropriate as the contract lacks arithmetic operations, preventing integer overflows despite compiler version risks. The SWC-107 label applies due to the access control vulnerability in the pull function, allowing potential unauthorized withdrawals. Evidence: No arithmetic operations found (Task 6), eliminating overflow risks under SWC-101; Critical access control flaw in pull function (Task 8) matches SWC-107 criteria; Compiler version 0.6.11 lacks native overflow protection, justifying SWC-101 consideration

The SWC-107 label applies due to the access control vulnerability in the pull function, allowing potential unauthorized withdrawals.
